title: Trilegal, Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas, Latham, AZB, Macfarlanes advise on Mittal-Poonawalla consortium acquiring Rajasthan Royals for $1.65 bn
description: A consortium of the Mittal family, consisting of Lakshmi N Mittal, Aditya Mittal, and Adar Poonawalla, has signed definitive agreements to acquire Rajasthan Royals from Manoj Badale and the consortium, for an enterprise value of $1.65 billion.Trilegal is advising the Mittal family on this acquisition along with Sapan Gupta, ArcelorMittal Group General Counsel and Kunal Vyas, Head of Tax and Legal at Mittal Investments UK Limited.Trilegal’s role involved advising on structuring the transaction al
